375.non_demand_effect_1: Draw and tuck a ${age_5}. You may return a top card from your board.

376.echo_effect_1: Meld your bottom green card. Maintain its splay.
376.name: Thermometer
376.non_demand_effect_1: Draw and meld a card of value one higher than the value of your top yellow card. If the melded card is yellow, repeat this dogma effect.

377.name: Coke
377.non_demand_effect_1: Draw and reveal a ${age_6}. If it has a ${icon_5}, meld it and repeat this dogma effect. Otherwise, foreshadow it.

378.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you transfer a top non-red card with a ${icon_2} or ${icon_5} from your board to my board! If you do, draw and foreshadow a ${age_6}!
378.name: Octant

379.name: Palampore
379.non_demand_effect_1: Draw and score a card of value equal to a bonus that occurs more than once on your board, if you have such a bonus.
379.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your purple cards right.
379.non_demand_effect_3: If you have six or more bonuses on your board, claim the Wealth achievement.

380.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you return a top card from your board of value less than ${age_3}!
380.name: Seed Drill
380.non_demand_effect_1: Choose the ${age_3}, ${age_4}, or ${age_5} deck. If there is at least one card in that deck, you may transfer its bottom card to the available achievements.

381.name: Pressure Cooker
381.non_demand_effect_1: Return all cards from your hand. For each top card on your board with a bonus, draw a card of value equal to that bonus.

382.echo_effect_1: Score a top card from your board without a ${icon_5}.
382.name: Stove
382.non_demand_effect_1: Draw and tuck a ${age_4}. If your top card of the tucked card's color has value less than ${age_4}, draw and score a ${age_4}.
382.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your green cards right.

383.echo_effect_1: Draw a card of a value present in any player's hand.
383.name: Piano
383.non_demand_effect_1: If you have five top cards, each with a different value, return five cards from your score pile and then draw and score a card of each of your top card's values in ascending order.

384.echo_effect_1: Look at the top card of any deck, then place it back on top.
384.name: Tuning Fork
384.non_demand_effect_1: Return a card from your hand. If you do, draw and reveal a card of the same value, and meld it if it is higher than a top card of the same color on your board. Otherwise, return it. You may repeat this dogma effect.

385.echo_effect_1: Draw and foreshadow a card of any value.
385.name: Bifocals
385.non_demand_effect_1: You may return a card from your forecast. If you do, draw and foreshadow a card of equal value to the card returned.
385.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your green cards right.

386.echo_effect_1: Meld a blue or yellow card from your hand.
386.name: Stethoscope
386.non_demand_effect_1: Draw a ${age_7}. If you melded a blue card due to Stethoscope's echo effect, draw an ${age_8}.
386.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your yellow cards right.

387.name: Loom
387.non_demand_effect_1: You may return two cards of different value from your score pile. If you do, draw and tuck three ${age_6}s.
387.non_demand_effect_2: If you have five or more ${icon_0} visible on your board in one color, claim the Heritage achievement.

388.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you draw and tuck a ${age_6}! Transfer the top two cards of its color from your board to my score pile! Transfer the bottom card of its color from my board to your score pile!
388.name: Shrapnel

389.name: Hot Air Balloon
389.non_demand_effect_1: You may achieve (if eligible) a top card from any other player's board if they have an achievement of matching value. If you do, transfer your top green card to that player's board. Otherwise, draw and meld a ${age_7}.

390.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you draw and reveal a ${age_6}! If it is blue or yellow, transfer it and all cards in your hand to my hand! If it is red or green, keep it and transfer two cards from your score pile to mine! If it is purple, keep it!
390.name: Steamboat

391.name: Dentures
391.non_demand_effect_1: Score the top two non-bottom cards of the color of the last card you tucked due to Dentures. If there are none to score, draw and tuck a ${age_6}, then repeat this dogma effect.
391.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your blue cards right.

392.echo_effect_1: Score an odd-valued card from your hand.
392.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you return all odd-valued cards in your hand! Draw a ${age_6}!
392.name: Morphine
392.non_demand_effect_1: Draw a card of value one higher than the highest card returned due to the demand, if any were returned.
392.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your red cards right.

393.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you return two cards from your score pile!
393.name: Indian Clubs
393.non_demand_effect_1: For every value of card you have in your score pile, score a card from your hand of that value.

394.name: Kaleidoscope
394.non_demand_effect_1: Draw and meld a ${age_7}. You may splay your cards of that color right.

395.echo_effect_1: Meld a card from your forecast.
395.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you take the highest top card from your board into your hand!
395.name: Photography
395.non_demand_effect_1: If you have at least three echo effects visible in one color, claim the History achievement.

396.name: Typewriter
396.non_demand_effect_1: Return all cards from your hand. Draw a ${age_6}. For each color of card returned, draw a card of the next higher value.

397.echo_effect_1: If you have five top cards, draw and score a ${age_7}.
397.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you transfer all of your top cards with a bonus to my score pile! If you transfered any, draw a ${age_7}!
397.name: Machine Gun
397.non_demand_effect_1: Return all your top non-red cards.

398.name: Rubber
398.non_demand_effect_1: Score a top card from your board without a bonus.
398.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your red cards up.

399.echo_effect_1: Draw two ${age_9}s. Return one, foreshadow the other.
399.name: Jeans
399.non_demand_effect_1: Choose two different values less than ${age_7}. Draw and reveal a card of each value. Meld one, and return the other.

400.name: Telegraph
400.non_demand_effect_1: You may choose an opponent and a color. Match your splay in that color to theirs.
400.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your blue cards up.

401.echo_effect_1: Score your top or bottom green card.
401.name: Elevator
401.non_demand_effect_1: Choose a value present in your score pile. Choose to transfer all cards of the chosen value from either all other players' hands or all their score piles to your score pile.

402.name: Fertilizer
402.non_demand_effect_1: You may return a card from your hand. If you do, transfer all cards from all score piles to your hand of value equal to the returned card.
402.non_demand_effect_2: Draw and foreshadow a card of any value.

403.echo_effect_1: Score a non-purple top card from your board without a bonus.
403.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you draw and meld a ${age_1}!
403.name: Ice Cream
403.non_demand_effect_1: Choose the ${age_6}, ${age_7}, ${age_8}, or ${age_9} deck. If there is at least one card in that deck, you may transfer its bottom card to the available achievements.

404.name: Saxophone
404.non_demand_effect_1: You may splay your purple cards up.
404.non_demand_effect_2: If the ${music_note} for Bell, Flute, Piano, and Saxophone are visible anywhere, you win. Otherwise, draw a ${age_7} for each ${music_note} that is visible.

405.name: Radio Telescope
405.non_demand_effect_1: For every two ${icon_3} on your board, draw a ${age_9}. Meld one of the cards drawn and return the rest. If you meld A. I. due to this dogma effect, you win.

406.name: X-Ray
406.non_demand_effect_1: For every three ${icon_2} on your board, draw and foreshadow a card of any value.
406.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your yellow cards up.

407.echo_effect_1: Meld a card from hand with a ${icon_2}.
407.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you return the highest card in your score pile for which you do not have a card of matching value in your hand! Return a top card from your board with a ${icon_6}!
407.name: Bandage

408.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you transfer all cards without a ${icon_6} from your hand to my hand!
408.name: Parachute

409.name: Nylon
409.non_demand_effect_1: Draw and tuck an ${age_8} for every three ${icon_5} on your board. If any of the tucked cards were green, repeat this dogma effect.
409.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your red cards up.

410.echo_effect_1: Return all cards from your hand and draw two ${age_8}s.
410.name: Sliced Bread
410.non_demand_effect_1: Return a card from your score pile. Draw and score two cards of value one less than the value of the card returned.

411.echo_effect_1: You may score a card from your hand.
411.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you return all cards from your score pile of value matching any of your top cards!
411.name: Air Conditioner

412.name: Tractor
412.non_demand_effect_1: Draw and score a ${age_7}. Draw a ${age_7}.

413.name: Crossword
413.non_demand_effect_1: For each visible bonus on your board, draw a card of that value.

414.name: Television
414.non_demand_effect_1: Choose a value and an opponent. Transfer a card of that value from their score pile to their board. If they have an achievement of the same value, achieve (if eligible) a card of that value from their score pile.

415.name: Calculator
415.non_demand_effect_1: Score two bottom non-blue cards from your board. If you scored two and they have a total value less than 11, draw a card of that total value and repeat this dogma effect (once only).
415.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your blue cards up.

416.name: Laser
416.non_demand_effect_1: Return all unclaimed standard achievements. Then, return half (rounded up) of the cards in your score pile. Draw and meld two ${age_10}s.

417.name: Helicopter
417.non_demand_effect_1: Transfer a top card other than Helicopter from any player's board to its owner's score pile. You may return a card from your hand which shares an icon with the transferred card. If you do, repeat this dogma effect.

418.echo_effect_1: Meld a card from your hand.
418.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you return your top card of the color I melded due to Jet's echo effect!
418.name: Jet

419.name: Credit Card
419.non_demand_effect_1: You may take a top non-green card from your board into your hand. If you do, draw and score a card of equal value.
419.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your green cards up.

420.name: Email
420.non_demand_effect_2: Execute all non-demand dogma effects on your lowest non-green top card. Do not share them.

421.echo_effect_1: Draw and score a card of any value.
421.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you transfer the highest top non-yellow card without a ${icon_1} from your board to my board!
421.name: ATM
421.non_demand_effect_1: You may splay your purple cards up.

422.echo_effect_1: Take a non-yellow top card from your board and tuck it.
422.name: Wristwatch
422.non_demand_effect_1: For each visible bonus on your board, draw and tuck a card of that value, in ascending order.

423.echo_effect_1: Draw and meld a card of value less than ${age_10}.
423.name: Karaoke
423.non_demand_effect_1: Execute all of the non-demand dogma effects of the card you melded due to Karaoke's echo effect. Do not share them.
423.non_demand_effect_2: You may take a bottom card from your board into your hand.

424.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you transfer your top green card to my hand! If Scissors is your new top green card, I win!
424.name: Rock
424.non_demand_effect_1: You may score a top card from your board. If Paper is your top green card, you win.

425.name: Artificial Heart
425.non_demand_effect_1: Claim one standard achievement, if eligible. Your current score is doubled for the purpose of checking eligibility.

426.name: Human Genome
426.non_demand_effect_1: You may draw and score a card of any value. Take a bottom card from your board into your hand. If the values of all of the cards in your hand match the values of all the cards in your score pile exactly, you win.

427.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you transfer all cards in your hand to my hand! Draw a ${age_9}!
427.name: Camcorder
427.non_demand_effect_1: Meld all ${age_9}s from your hand. Return all other cards from your hand. Draw three ${age_9}s.

428.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you choose an icon type! Transfer all top cards without that icon from your board to my score pile!
428.name: Social Networking
428.non_demand_effect_1: If you have fewer ${icon_5}, fewer ${icon_1}, and ${icon_4} than each other player, you win.

429.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you return all cards from your forecast!
429.name: GPS
429.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your yellow cards up.

430.i_demand_effect_1: ${I demand} you return four cards from your score pile!
430.name: Flash Drive
430.non_demand_effect_1: Return a card from your score pile. If you do, you may splay any one color of your cards up.

431.name: Cell Phone
431.non_demand_effect_1: Draw a ${age_10} for every two ${icon_6} on your board.
431.non_demand_effect_2: You may splay your green cards up.
431.non_demand_effect_3: You may tuck any number of cards with a ${icon_6} from your hand, splaying up each color you tucked into.

432.name: MP3
432.non_demand_effect_1: Return any number of cards from your hand. For each card returned, claim two standard achievements for which you are eligible.
432.non_demand_effect_2: Draw and score a card of value equal to a bonus on your board.

433.name: Puzzle Cube
433.non_demand_effect_1: You may score the bottom card or two bottom cards of one color from your board. If all the colors on your board contain the same number of visible cards (unsplayed = 1), you win.

434.name: Sudoku
434.non_demand_effect_1: Draw and meld a card of any value. If you have at least nine different bonus values visible on your board, you win. Execute each of the melded card's non-demand dogma effects. Do not share them.

435.alternative_condition_for_claiming: May also be claimed via ${age_5} Palampore.
435.condition_for_claiming: Claim this special achievement ${immediately} if you have eight or more bonuses visible on your board.
435.name: Wealth

436.alternative_condition_for_claiming: May also be claimed via ${age_4} Barometer.
436.condition_for_claiming: Claim this special achievement ${immediately} if you have seven or more cards in your forecast.
436.name: Destiny

437.alternative_condition_for_claiming: May also be claimed via ${age_6} Loom.
437.condition_for_claiming: Claim this special achievement ${immediately} if you have eight or more ${icon_0} visible in one color.
437.name: Heritage

438.alternative_condition_for_claiming: May also be claimed via ${age_7} Photography.
438.condition_for_claiming: Claim this special achievement ${immediately} if you have a color with four or more visible echo effects.
438.name: History

439.alternative_condition_for_claiming: May also be claimed via ${age_3} Novel.
439.condition_for_claiming: Claim this special achievement ${immediately} if you have three icons or more of the same icon type visible in each of four different colors. (Each color has to have the same icon as the other colors.)
439.name: Supremacy
